name: FocusTrap

files.content:
export { FocusTrap, FocusTrapInitialFocus } from './FocusTrap';
export type { FocusTrapProps } from './FocusTrap';

visual_summary: Component that traps focus within a specified element, preventing it from escaping to other nodes in the DOM. Typically used to prevent keyboard navigation from leaving the component. Useful for modal-like UI components where users might try to navigate out by keyboard.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: FocusTrap
Description: Component that traps focus within a specified element, preventing it from escaping to other nodes in the DOM. Typically used to prevent keyboard navigation from leaving the component. Useful for modal-like UI components where users might try to navigate out by keyboard.
Style: material-ui, ui-component
Interactions: focusable, keyboard-driven
Tags: focus, modal, keyboard

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):

export type { FocusTrapProps } from './FocusTrap';
